meaning: n.鍒嗛厤,濮旀淳,浠诲姟,(璇惧)浣滀笟
examples: I had set myself a tough assignment.
I've been working at my assignment all day.
It had been a monumental blunder to give him the assignment.
Trying to get a UN consensus may be Ambassador John Bolton's first major assignment.
Prior to rejoining CNN, Elam served as a weekend evening anchor and general assignment reporter for KNBC.
